---
title: "Working with Quarto"
subtitle: "Week 1"
description: "Monday April 14^th^, 2026"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
:

## {{< fa person-chalkboard title="a person pointing at a chalkboard" >}} Lecture Materials {#lecture-materials}

| Lecture slides | Materials | 
|----------------|------------------|
| [Lecture 1.1: topic Intro](lecture-slides/lecture1.intro-slides.qmd){target="_blank"}   ||
| [Lecture 1.2: topic Quarto](lecture-slides/lecture1.quarto-slides.qmd){target="_blank"} |<a href="../downloadables/week1/hello.qmd" download>Download hello.qmd</a> |
: {.hover .bordered tbl-colwidths="[50,25,25]"} 


## {{< fa pencil title="pencil" >}} Assignments {#assignment-reminders}

| Assignment Type | Assignment Title                              | Date Assigned  | Date Due                   |
|-----------------|-----------------------------------------------|----------------|----------------------------|
| HW              | [Homework Assignment #1](assignments/HW1.qmd) | DD/MM/YYYY     | DD/MM/YYYY, 11:59pm PT     |
: {.hover .bordered tbl-colwidths="[20,30,20,30]"}
